item.name: Deepbody Boarfish
item.description:
These saltwater wavekin are known far and wide for their unique shape and bright color.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: These crimson-scaled fish have exceptionally tall and thin diamond-shaped bodies. The sight of them swimming in a school─a familiar spectacle in which fishermen delight─is oft likened to that of a red mosaic surfing the seas.
